title: Hut 8 Full Year 2024 Earnings: EPS: US$3.71 (vs US$0.47 in FY 2023)
text: Hut 8 reported full year 2024 earnings: EPS of US$3.71 (compared to US$0.47 in FY 2023). Revenue of US$162.4 million, representing a 68% increase year-over-year. Net Income of US$338.9 million, up US$317.1 million from the prior year. Forward Outlook: Revenue is forecast to grow 40% p.a. on average during the next 3 years, compared to a 12% growth forecast for the Software industry in the US. This substantially exceeds industry growth rates and positions Hut 8 as a high-growth company despite profitability challenges ahead. Market Performance: The company's stock experienced a notable decline, with shares down 15% over the preceding week following the earnings announcement, suggesting market concerns about forward profitability despite strong historical earnings.
